rows.label: qev051510_MSG0001
rows.name:
Even though I removed the luggage the Nopohippos were carrying
and made them fight with 17 times their usual ferocity...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051510_MSG0002
rows.name:
We lost, mo~
The Nopohippos are covered in scratches, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051510_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have to put them in the Drongo Caravan hot springs
and heal their wounds, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051510_MSG0004
rows.name:
...You were strong, mo. I'm sure you'll win the tournament, mo!
Lulirita guarantees it, mo![ST:wait ]
